title: stachys recta subsp. plumosa
intro: Stachys recta subsp. plumosa is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant, a type of herbaceous perennial belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys recta subsp. plumosa include relief from colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
